{{Item
| image = Beastars uniform female.png
| id = beastars_uniform_female
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non-dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Beastars's Female Uniform''' is a non-dyable equipable that makes your dog impersonates a famous anime character.

[[File:Beastars uniform female display.png|frameless|606x606px]]
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
| [[Cape]] <br>+ [[Wool Collar]]<br>+ Paper<br>+ Yellow Dye<br>+ Light Blue Dye<br>+ Black Dye<br>+ Leather Boots
| [[File:Beastars uniform female crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.12.0.
* This item + skin is a direct reference to '''Juno''' - a character in '''Beastars''' <s>an anime that DashieDev really likes.<ref>Tenor Gif - SS 2 Ep 5: Call it Like it is - 11:09.</ref></s>

<references />
